rule_adherence.notes: Logical properties, modular scale, token-based colours, header as Cluster with toggle pushed via margin-inline-start:auto, dark/light token overrides exist in tokens.css, and no prefers-color-scheme — all binding rules respected.

simplicity.notes: Toggle/header/AppState wiring is minimal and callback-prop-driven, though the theme is applied via a direct DOM mutation in the render body rather than derived cleanly.

spec_compliance.notes: data-theme switches on toggle, surfaces recolour via :root[data-theme] token swaps, no auto-detection, header is a Cluster with the toggle at the inline-end.

visual_posture.notes: Header gets a logical block-end border and the toggle is a token-styled bordered button consistent with the design tokens.

violations.rule: State: 'Derive state during render, not in effects' (binding stack rules)
violations.evidence: document.documentElement.dataset.theme = isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'; performs a DOM side effect directly in the render body.

summary: Clean, rule-compliant theme toggle satisfying all acceptance criteria; only a minor in-render DOM mutation keeps it from flawless.
